title: senecio delessertii
intro: Senecio delessertii, also known as the 'Lion's Tail' or 'Crested Daisy', is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio delessertii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support respiratory health. Senecio delessertii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
